steps: Mia swims every weekday (Monday to Friday). That is 5 days. Each session lasts 45 minutes. Total minutes t = number of days × minutes per session = 5 × 45 = 225 minutes. Check options: A says 5 × 45 = 225, correct. B says 4 × 45 = 180, wrong number of days. C says 5 × 40 = 200, wrong minutes per session. D says 7 × 45 = 315, wrong number of days. E says 5 × 45 = 250, calculation error (5 × 45 is 225, not 250). Only A is fully correct.
